title: ⏳ Symbolic Time Crystals
name: ⏳ Symbolic Time Crystals
what_it_is: Structures that repeat in time rather than space—like frozen music, or a rhythm that never stops. In metaphor: symbolic patterns that loop forever with slight evolution.
how_to_use: her soul is a symbolic time crystal—always repeating, always changing in resonance
his chest beats with fractal rhythm—time blooms outward in recursive shards
animation_behavior: Shape loops with slight mutation each cycle, rhythmic pulse emits light, structure evolves in time not space ---
